explanation_templates.template: Drawing plans must be grouped as one searchable PDF before upload staging.

normalized_citation_evidence.normalized_claim: Drawing plans must be grouped together in one PDF, while applications, calculations, and other supporting documents are separate PDFs.

conditions: drawing plans are grouped in one PDF
applications calculations and supporting documents are prepared as separate PDFs

normalized_citation_evidence.human_review_note: A reviewer must confirm the normalized single-PDF claim against the changed Submit Plans Online guidance before promotion.
